subject: CATCH UP
body:
Thinking about you and hoping u are well.   As if that  TURKEY isn't gone 
long enough and now DREIDELS spin upon us.  My head is  spinning. Always wonder 
why I seem not to like holidays.
My back doesn't do well thru shopping for  the troops ,  cooking , stress , 
or maybe it's not just such a great spine.  Similar  issues as last year this 
time &  was tired of the meds.
Need  psycho analyst I guess.   Need one for  a good , quick stock purchase 
too since I don't do that well at the  LOTTERY  -  better at blackjack and 
maybe the track. Always  short
Anyway - I have your CHANUKAH  gift all chosen and on hold at  the store.  
Excited . You should get this week.     YEAH
  You are going thru a tough time , I know.  Will I get  to see you ?
Hi to Sarah  . (she'll get a present too  for  HOLIDAY Season    - it will 
make me a happier )
 
Marcia M.
p.s.   surprising  Bruce with Ski trip (+) for a few days,  with guys  this 
month  .
        Thought I might try to make it  up to NEW YORK   for a few days 
during then - If I have a problem with  place to stay ,  if I can get a flight ,  
can I call you  ?
Best , "  Marsh"
pps     HUGS  today



**************************************Check out AOL's list of 2007's hottest 
products.
(http://money.aol.com/special/hot-products-2007?NCID=aoltop00030000000001)
body_html:
Thinking about you and hoping u are well.   As if that TURKEY isn't gone long enough and now DREIDELS spin upon us.  My head is spinning. Always wonder why I seem not to like holidays.
My back doesn't do well thru shopping for  the troops , cooking , stress , or maybe it's not just such a great spine.  Similar issues as last year this time &  was tired of the meds.
Need  psycho analyst I guess.   Need one for a good , quick stock purchase too since I don't do that well at the LOTTERY  -  better at blackjack and maybe the track. Always short
Anyway - I have your CHANUKAH  gift all chosen and on hold at the store.  Excited . You should get this week.    YEAH
  You are going thru a tough time , I know.  Will I get to see you ?
Hi to Sarah  . (she'll get a present too  for HOLIDAY Season    - it will make me a happier )
 
Marcia M.
p.s.   surprising Bruce with Ski trip (+) for a few days,  with guys  this month .
        Thought I might try to make it up to NEW YORK   for a few days during then - If I have a problem with place to stay ,  if I can get a flight ,  can I call you ?
Best , " Marsh"
pps     HUGS  today
